holdings.infoBox: QAT is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Qatar National Bank (Q.P.S.C.) stock at 22.28%, Qatar Islamic Bank (Q.P.S.C.) at 13.56%, Industries Qatar Q.P.S.C. at 6.77%, Ooredoo Q.P.S.C. at 4.70%, and The Commercial Bank (P.S.Q.C.) at 4.45%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Qatar ETF (QAT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Qatar Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of large-, mid and small-cap Qatari companies. QAT was launched on Apr 29, 2014 and is issued by BlackRock.
